name: Deploy to Firebase Hosting on merge
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
jobs:
  build_and_deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repo
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to Firebase Hosting
        uses: FirebaseExtended/action-hosting-deploy@v0
        with:
          repoToken: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          projectId: dziennik-elewatora
          channelId: live
        env:
          FIREBASE_TOKEN: 1//09Mbw4NH2qk4gCgYIARAAGAkSNgF-L9IrGdavM7JZ-Fb1JadZQFqaN5_Mas0l9_oz_VNt6_H7F4XL-nIsqVfXtOcINq2lcwDWLw
